testcase.name: test_claim_reward_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200, got 520: Internal Server Error assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comments.py:355: in test_claim_reward_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 520: Internal Server Error E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cannot_claim_twice
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comments.py:380: in test_cannot_claim_twice assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 520 E assert 520 == 400 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comments.py:471: in test_reward_tier_3_votes assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
